title: Corrupted Horizons
description: Add Mini-Bosses! Increase Difficulty, Earn Rewards And Begin Your Adventure! 🧭⚔️
body:
Upgrade Your Adventure, Fight Against Even Stronger Mobs Than Ever! Witness Extremely Powerful Rewards, Configure The Plugin As You Desire. Your Adventure Begins **NOW!**

This plugin adds new "Corrupted" mobs. With these mobs, the game is harder and better than ever! Every corrupted mob is kind of a stronger version of the vanilla mobs. They are like mini-bosses. When a mob turns corrupted its health will be multiplied. Also the drops and the xp income will be multiplied too. All corrupted mobs have uniqe abilities. Also when a corrupted mob is defeated, random rewards will be given. And... with a really small chance you can get "Corrupted Items". These items is way powerful than usual.

Corrupted Evoker (Without Bossbar):

![A Corrupted Evoker](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8114b9d8f20269e73ecd05a4a6bda584f65f202f.png)

Corrupted Cave Spider Clone:

![A Cave Spider Clone](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2a0d8cc9bc97b7df57a7d7707d6c172a89d10a17.png)


## Config.yml:

- -> ✅ Configure Mob Abilities
- -> ✅ Configure Corrupted Items
- -> ✅ Configure Multipliers
- -> ✅ Configure Chances
- -> ✅ Configure Loot Pool (+ Corrupted Pool)
- -> ✅ Add Your Custom Items
- -> ✅ Configure Bossbar
- -> ✅ Change Almost EVERYTHING As You Desire!

### Abilities: 
- -> Fireball Throw: Mob Throws Fireballs To Environment.
- -> Wind Explosion: Mob Throws Wind Bursts To Environment.
- -> TNT Throw: Mob Throws TNT To Environment.
- -> Minion Spawn: Mob Spawns Random Enemies That Chosen From Enemy Pool.
- -> Lightning Strike: Mob Strikes Random Lightnings Around You.
- -> TNT Rain: TNT's Will Start To Rain From Sky.
- -> Clones: Mob Spawns It's Clones.
- -> Effects Generator: Mob Gives Itself Random Effects That Chosen From Effect Pool.
- -> Debuff Effects: Mob Will Give Debuff Effects To Players.
- -> Nuke: Mob Makes A Devastating Explosion.
More Coming Soon! 👀

Corrupted Evoker Using Wind Explosion Ability:

![Corrupted Evoker Using Wind Explosion Ability](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2faa337002f55f74be67874e9bcd84d56cf26618.png)

These Images Are Just Example. More To Explore! 🧭

The Only Limit Is Your Imagination! 🧠✨
